subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! Sanctified is Thine Essence above the comprehension of minds and understandings, and exalted is Thine Identity above all conjecture and fancy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مولای مولای تقدس ذاتک عن درک العقول و الافهام و تنزهت هویتک عن الظنون
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love and unity, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @non-participation in politics, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
